body.title: Inhibition-aware habit seeder
body.result: run_inhibition_seed_pass() seeded 10 habits with twm_ttl_seconds (300-3600s). All probes passed. Registered as Igor tool. Enables BG refractory suppression.
body.description: Build schema habit that iterates a seed spec (habit_id, ttl_seconds, result_format, code_ref, status) and auto-wires inhibition chain + TWM push for each. Probe loop: call twice within TTL, assert second call is cache hit. Mark status=live on pass, status=failed|reason on fail. Covers existing habits needing inhibition retrofitted.
